source.name: IAU/USGS Gazetteer of Planetary Nomenclature
source.coordinateSystem: Moon selenocentric, planetocentric coordinates; east-positive longitude in degrees, 0-360.
source.derivation: Filtered center-point nomenclature records to adopted IAU lunar features (craters plus named feature classes such as maria, montes, rimae, dorsa, valles, and related descriptor terms).
